tools.name: list_items
tools.description: List items from the app database
tools.sql: SELECT * FROM items WHERE (:status IS NULL OR status = :status) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT :limit

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Get a single item by ID

tools.name: create_item
tools.sql: INSERT INTO items (id, user_id, title, created_at) VALUES (:__uuid, :__user_id, :title, :__now)
